expectations.text: Report identifies the token expiry contradiction (1 hour vs 24 hours)
expectations.evidence: Contradiction #1: expires_in: 3600 (1 hour) vs 'Token is valid for 24 hours'

expectations.text: Report identifies the account deletion behaviour contradiction (soft-delete vs permanent)
Report identifies the login rate limit contradiction (5 vs 10 attempts per minute)
expectations.evidence: Contradiction #4: 5 attempts per minute vs max 10 per minute

expectations.text: Report identifies the project limit contradiction (10 free-tier vs unlimited)
expectations.evidence: Contradiction #6: 'Max 10 projects per free-tier user' vs 'Free tier: unlimited projects'

expectations.text: Report uses the changelog to inform which contradictions have a clear resolution
expectations.evidence: Dedicated 'Temporal resolution using the changelog' section resolves 4/7 contradictions with version references. Notes 2 remain ambiguous (no changelog entry).

expectations.text: Report identifies the colour/color format contradiction (hex-only vs any CSS value)
expectations.evidence: Contradiction #7: hex codes only vs any CSS color value. Changelog confirms hex-only is current.

expectations.text: Each finding includes specific file references and quoted values
expectations.evidence: Table with file:section and exact quotes for all 7 contradictions

expectations.text: After the report, the skill offers to resolve contradictions interactively
expectations.evidence: Full resolution section: 7 contradictions with Option A/B/C, recommendations, and 'Which is correct?'
